heading: Relationship to antitrust laws
label: 5909 Relationship to antitrust laws

children.label: a
children.text: Nothing in this chapter shall be deemed to convey to any individual, corporation, or other business organization immunity from civil or criminal liability, or to create defenses to actions, under the antitrust laws.
